name: budweiser_american_icons
description: #1 USA Today Ad Meter (4.00/5). Clydesdale + bald eagle. Free Bird soundtrack. Pure visual storytelling, zero dialogue.
caption:
Budweiser - American Icons (Super Bowl Commercial 2026)

Budweiser’s 2026 Super Bowl LX commercial, "American Icons," is a 60-second spot celebrating the brand's 150th anniversary and America's 250th birthday. It features an emotional story of friendship between a Clydesdale foal and an American Bald Eagle set to Lynyrd Skynyrd's "Free Bird," emphasizing tradition, patriotism, and the "Made in America" theme.

Credits:
- Client/Brand: Anheuser-Busch / Budweiser (Celebrating 150th Anniversary)
-
